title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3.3, Phi-4, Gemma 2, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull, list, copy, delete models via simple API.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; same generate/chat/embed API surface as Python.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package exposing Ollama models as standard LangChain LLMs and embedders.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (now renamed ‘Open WebUI’); chat UI, model management, RAG, user auth.

title: ollama4j
summary: Unofficial Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; fluent builder API, streaming, chat, embeddings, list/pull models.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem wrapping the Ollama REST API; chat, generate, pull, list, copy, delete models.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based interactive CLI for chatting with Ollama models; history, syntax highlighting, tab completion.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that routes GitHub Copilot calls to a local Ollama model for privacy.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with optional GPU support, PVC, ingress and HPA.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official Docker images (CPU & GPU) for Ollama; minimal Ubuntu-based images with automatic model volume.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaTextEmbedder nodes for NLP pipelines.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Official C# .NET client library for Ollama; supports .NET 6+, async enumerable streaming, chat & embed.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama + Chroma; ingest PDFs, query with local embeddings and Llama 3.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix derivation for Ollama; pinned builds for macOS and Linux with CUDA and ROCm variants.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate exposing typed async wrappers over Ollama REST endpoints; tokio & reqwest.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama service in CI pipelines for testing LLM-powered features.

title: ollama-go
summary: Official Go client for Ollama; small surface, generate/chat/embed helpers, stdlib context support.

title: ollama-vscode
summary: VS Code extension to chat with any Ollama model inside the editor sidebar; syntax highlight, code insertion.

title: ollama-huggingface
summary: Community scripts to convert & quantize Hugging Face models into Ollama Modelfile format (GGUF).
